'''''Sovereign''''' was the lead ship of the [[Sovereign-class Super Star Destroyer|''Sovereign''-class Super Star Destroyer]] line. It was still under construction during the time of the [[Dark Empire]].<ref name="DESB" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', ''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'', and finally ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' all incorrectly states that the ''Sovereign'' was under Warlord [[Zsinj]]'s command,<ref name=SWE>''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', p. 281</ref><ref name=AGttSWU>''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'', p. 503</ref><ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|186|Sovereign}}</ref> when other sources such as ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' state that Zsinj only had one Super Star Destroyer.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

This error might come from the German translation of ''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]''. In the final confrontation between the heroes and Zsinj his ship the ''[[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|Iron Fist]]'' was erroneously translated as ''Souverän'', the German word for ''Sovereign''. In addition both the English and German version of the novel describe the ''Iron Fist'' in the final confrontation as a mere Star Destroyer, not a Super Star Destroyer.<ref>''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'', chapter 26</ref> Somehow this error might have made it into the ''Star Wars Encyclopedia'' in 1998, which first described the ''Sovereign'' as one "of Warlord Zsinj's Star Destroyers", while the later ''A Guide to the Star Wars Universe'' published in the year 2000 describe it as a "Star Destroyer in Warlord Zsinj's fleet". Both sources attribute this information to ''The Courtship of Princess Leia''.<ref name=SWE/><ref name=AGttSWU/> Finally ''The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia'' of 2008 mixes these two entries with the ''Sovereign'' mentioned in the ''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]''.<ref name="CSWE"/>
